# Review Checklist Template
# Generated by /speckit.checklist for each feature

## Feature: {feature_name}
## Spec: {spec_id}
## Reviewer: {reviewer}
## Date: {date}

---

## Security Checklist

- [ ] SEC-01: No secrets, keys, or tokens in source code
- [ ] SEC-02: All user inputs validated with Zod schemas
- [ ] SEC-03: Auth guards applied to all protected endpoints
- [ ] SEC-04: Rate limiting configured on public endpoints
- [ ] SEC-05: CORS configuration is explicit (no wildcard origins)
- [ ] SEC-06: SQL queries use parameterized inputs
- [ ] SEC-07: XSS prevention: output encoding applied
- [ ] SEC-08: CSRF protection active for cookie-based sessions
- [ ] SEC-09: Password hashing uses bcrypt/argon2
- [ ] SEC-10: File uploads have size and type validation

## Architecture Compliance Checklist

- [ ] ARC-01: Code follows layer structure (presentation/app/domain/infra)
- [ ] ARC-02: No cross-domain direct imports (use public API)
- [ ] ARC-03: Shared utilities in packages/ not duplicated
- [ ] ARC-04: API endpoints follow REST/GraphQL conventions
- [ ] ARC-05: OpenAPI/Swagger decorators on all endpoints
- [ ] ARC-06: No ADR violations detected
- [ ] ARC-07: Domain events properly defined and used
- [ ] ARC-08: Dependency direction follows domain relationship map

## Performance Checklist

- [ ] PER-01: No N+1 database queries
- [ ] PER-02: Database queries use appropriate indexes
- [ ] PER-03: Caching applied where beneficial (Redis, TanStack Query)
- [ ] PER-04: Pagination implemented on list endpoints
- [ ] PER-05: Bundle size within budget (< 200KB gzipped per page)
- [ ] PER-06: No unnecessary re-renders in React components
- [ ] PER-07: Images optimized (next/image or CDN)

## Testing Checklist

- [ ] TST-01: Unit test coverage ≥ 80%
- [ ] TST-02: Happy path tests for all use cases
- [ ] TST-03: Edge case tests (empty, null, boundary values)
- [ ] TST-04: Error case tests (invalid input, unauthorized, not found)
- [ ] TST-05: Integration tests for API endpoints
- [ ] TST-06: No skipped tests without documented justification
- [ ] TST-07: Test data does not contain production data

## Code Quality Checklist

- [ ] COD-01: No `any` types in TypeScript
- [ ] COD-02: No `@ts-ignore` or `@ts-expect-error` without justification
- [ ] COD-03: No `eslint-disable` without justification
- [ ] COD-04: No commented-out code
- [ ] COD-05: No TODOs without linked issue/ADR reference
- [ ] COD-06: Imports follow ordering convention
- [ ] COD-07: Naming follows conventions (PascalCase, camelCase, kebab-case)
- [ ] COD-08: Functions ≤ 50 lines, files ≤ 400 lines
- [ ] COD-09: Public functions have JSDoc documentation

## Documentation Checklist

- [ ] DOC-01: API endpoints documented in OpenAPI/Swagger
- [ ] DOC-02: README.md updated if new module/package
- [ ] DOC-03: Changelog entry added for user-facing changes
- [ ] DOC-04: Complex business logic has inline comments
- [ ] DOC-05: ADR created if architecture decision made

## Accessibility Checklist (Web UI)

- [ ] A11Y-01: Color contrast meets WCAG 2.1 AA (4.5:1)
- [ ] A11Y-02: All interactive elements are keyboard accessible
- [ ] A11Y-03: Images have alt text
- [ ] A11Y-04: ARIA labels on custom components
- [ ] A11Y-05: RTL layout works for Arabic

## Arabic/Bilingual Checklist

- [ ] AR-01: All user-facing text available in Arabic
- [ ] AR-02: RTL layout renders correctly
- [ ] AR-03: Date/time formats follow Arabic locale
- [ ] AR-04: Number formatting follows Arabic conventions
- [ ] AR-05: No hardcoded LTR assumptions

---

## Verdict

[ ] APPROVED — All checks pass
[ ] APPROVED WITH COMMENTS — Minor issues, non-blocking
[ ] CHANGES REQUESTED — Issues found (list below)
[ ] REJECTED — Critical violation

## Issues Found
